name: Pop-up Pizza
recipeInstructions:
Batter:
1. In a bowl, combine milk, oil, and eggs. Beat for 1 minute on medium speed.
2. Add flour and salt. Beat until smooth.
Filling:
3. In a large skillet, brown hamburger and drain excess fat.
4. Stir in onion, green pepper, garlic, oregano, salt, water, hot pepper sauce, and tomato sauce mix.
5. Simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Assembly:
6. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
7. Pour the hot meat mixture into a greased 13x9 inch baking pan.
8. Arrange cheese slices on top of the filling.
9. Pour batter evenly over the cheese, completely covering the filling.
10. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
11. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until puffed and brown.
Note: Be sure to turn off the oven once the pizza is done baking.
